purpose: Define the fixed flat receipt contract that Python may derive from a verified WUCI-WARRANT JSON receipt before any assembly open-authorized command exists.
format_constraints: Exactly one 'label: value' field per line.
Labels must appear in field_order exactly.
Labels are lowercase and use hyphen separators.
The file ends with exactly one trailing newline.

value_constraints.action: one of open, release, trust, publish
value_constraints.group-public-key: 33-byte compressed SEC1 point encoded as 66 lowercase hex characters
value_constraints.group-commitment: 33-byte compressed SEC1 point encoded as 66 lowercase hex characters
value_constraints.signature-commitment: 33-byte compressed SEC1 point encoded as 66 lowercase hex characters

assembly_non_goals: Do not add assembly open-authorized yet.
Do not add assembly release-authorized yet.
Do not parse receipt JSON in assembly yet.
Do not accept arbitrary signer material yet.
Do not make Python the canonical authorization-message owner.
